Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:22 PM
I'm getting serious rendering issues when switching between VoQueue accounts at the same location
i was on vocobot at 420/911 and switched to vocoin which was at the top of the tower
half the tower didn't render and i fell through the floor and was completely glitched out
couldn't move
i switched back to vocobot and half the terrain didn't render, so i fell through the floor on there too and couldn't move
its completely fucked
iZac 29-Jul-18 06:32 PM
i've never had that issue and i've spent a lot of time switching between accounts at the HQ
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:32 PM

this is the first time i've encountered it
didn't you just implement some render fix
iZac 29-Jul-18 06:32 PM
that only affected other entities
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:32 PM

iZac 29-Jul-18 06:33 PM

if it's too long a 2b2t anti-spam filter means no replicate messages are sent
the [awoidhawd] at the end tries to combat it but still doesn't work on long messages
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:35 PM

iZac 29-Jul-18 06:35 PM
yeah that's probably too long
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:35 PM
also don't disreguard that render issue because it hasn't happened to you, that seriously fucked me over and we need to make sure its not an issue
iZac 29-Jul-18 06:36 PM
i can't fix something i can't reproduce
if we can create a scenario where i can reproduce it and figure out the cause, then i can try to fix it
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:38 PM
all i know is when i switched from VoCoBot to VoCoin half the tower was a chunk error and i could not move
iZac 29-Jul-18 06:39 PM
when switching between proxies it seems to your client as if you're joining a complete new server, so i don't think it was being in the same place that was an issue, just coincidence
only thing that stands out to me is the "dy": -627 at the end there
i think it's similar to the entity displacement issue which the guy who made the base proxy didn't fix himself, where he didn't divide the entity velocity packet
-627 would mean travelling downwards 627 blocks per tick
when it should be handled like this
client thinking you're moving 627 blocks down per tick would cause the server to teleport you back up, and your client decided it was far enough away to unload the chunk so it never reloaded it
seems plausible?
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:42 PM
could be, it was only parts of the chunk unloaded
iZac 29-Jul-18 06:42 PM
hm
parts as in vertical slices, or random blocks?
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:42 PM
almost like cubic chunks
iZac 29-Jul-18 06:42 PM
kk
hm
Deleted User 29-Jul-18 06:43 PM
but some random blocks were rendered

coltsnid 22-Nov-19 03:33 AM

Pork 22-Nov-19 03:42 AM

iZac 22-Nov-19 03:43 AM
future has something where you get desktop notifications if you take damage, or a player comes into render distance

Pork 22-Nov-19 03:47 AM
I mean you should never afk while connected to voqueue, you should disconnect and let it afk itself
So it doesn't matter
coltsnid 22-Nov-19 03:52 AM
why not
i afk on voqueue while i type on discord and such
Pork 22-Nov-19 03:54 AM
Because you assume everyone uses future (which has good antiafk)
If you're using impact for example you'll get kicked and then the whole point of voqueue is lost
iZac 22-Nov-19 03:55 AM
also voqueue can't detect if your window is open or not
Pork 22-Nov-19 03:55 AM
^
iZac 22-Nov-19 03:55 AM
so you'd always get the notifications
Pork 22-Nov-19 03:56 AM
Since i cant detect if the window is open i also only run the server side antiafk when no one is connected

Pork 22-Nov-19 06:04 AM

coltsnid 22-Nov-19 06:06 AM

Pork 22-Nov-19 06:18 AM

iZac 22-Nov-19 06:33 AM
my voqueue kept track of whether it was in queue or on 2b from the custom text on the player list
Pork 22-Nov-19 06:34 AM
That's how qls and qInfo work
iZac 22-Nov-19 06:34 AM
you could also do it by spectator mode = queue
Pork 22-Nov-19 06:34 AM
qls uses queue tab to get queue info
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 22-Nov-19 06:34 AM
Account status
Zer0ne12 is in game! HP: 19, Food: 17, AntiAFKing: true, TotalTimeOnline: 57m Kaikeunder1 is in game! HP: 20, Food: 20, AntiAFKing: true, TotalTimeOnline: 57m
Pork 22-Nov-19 06:34 AM
And qInfo uses ingame tab to get ingame info
How would you know from the tab if its ingame or not?
(i just have a boolean called ingame i switch to true when i get the connecting to server message in chat) (edited)
iZac 22-Nov-19 06:39 AM
if header.splitlines()[4] == "2b2t is full": #if waiting in queue on 2b2t
elif footer.splitlines()[-1] == "these are the only official 2b2t websites and contacts.": #on 2b2t server
Pork 22-Nov-19 06:40 AM
kk, thanks, im gonna be home in a couple minutes and ill implement all of this stuff

iZac 01-Dec-19 08:13 PM
no
but if it's afking in a ban chunk
lemme rephrase
if it's near a chunk
that chunk is made into a ban chunk
you can still connect
since the voqueue account is already there
any normal account couldn't
since it's the actual initial loading of the chunk 2b2t-side that causes a kick

@coltsnid nothing i can do about it messing with your accounts, thats 2b side @Wandachamp ill fix the italics @Wandachamp i already fixed that, but we didnt restart the slave servers yet so it didnt apply the fix @iZac 2b restarted 3 times in a row too fast, and auto queue kept logging you back in, geting your account temp banned from mojang, ive just added a delay to autoqeueue when it detects it cant login to accounts @coltsnid theres nothing to find out, thats just us waiting on a username response from mojang, the best i can do is not show it in qSee until we get the username

account sharing will make it less of an issue, and i increased autoqueue timeout so it should help (edited)
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:08 PM
okay nice
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:09 PM
i dont understand why you get double messages though
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:09 PM
i thought the problem was with auto queue
so i wasn't sure if the account sharing would help
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:09 PM
everytime you try to connect it says invalid session and you close and reopen minecraft right?
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:09 PM
no i use future's account switcher
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:09 PM
thats the same thing
each time you do that it logins into the account
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM
yeah
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM
increasing the account login counter in mojang's server
once it reaches too high of a number per X amount of time
it temp bans the account for 5-6 minutes in order to prevent abuse
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM
wat
qdc it
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM

You dont have an account by that name!
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM
thats broken

i'm telling you autoqueue is messed up or something
i can't qdc it
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM
thats not autoqueue
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:10 PM

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:11 PM
if it was autoqueue you would get a joined queue notif

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:22 PM

coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:22 PM

coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:22 PM

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:23 PM

coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:24 PM

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:24 PM
oh
right
ill just do another deletion pass after changing to settings updated message then
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:24 PM
sounds good
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:25 PM

coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:25 PM

i know i'm hesitant sometimes but as i've said i just want to make sure we don't get constant @developer pings about small issues or confusing glitches
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:26 PM
for sure, i care about it just as much since i will be the one pinged the most for voqueue
(also its the first time voco offers something for real money isnt it? people will be a lot more needy)
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:28 PM
that's a good point as well
i'm glad you share my keen aptitude for polishing the system!
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:29 PM
lol, for sure, (its much worse when you know your dumb design decisions in the past are what causing your headaches now :P)
also colt
about the undefined in qSee issue
thats the bot waiting for a username + mcuuid from mojang, should i not display it in qSee until we get the info? (edited)
(that would cause the same amount of mentions though, instead of wtf is undefined to why isnt my account showing in qSee)
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:31 PM

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:31 PM

coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:32 PM
can we change the placeholder name?
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:32 PM
thats uh not a placeholder
undefined is basically None (what you have in python) in javascript (edited)
but i can add a placeholder
(its undefined since the username variable is empty)

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:35 PM

I like that
Will do
coltsnid 04-Dec-19 02:36 PM
sweet
Pork 04-Dec-19 02:36 PM

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:37 PM
kk

Pork 04-Dec-19 02:38 PM

coltsnid 05-Dec-19 12:49 AM

coltsnid 05-Dec-19 01:37 AM
is this a voqueue bug
Pork 05-Dec-19 01:39 AM
Isn't that just the normal minecraft light bug?
(it couldn't be a voqueue bug since voqueue handles stuff by chunks, not blocks, so it couldn't generate problems in shapes like that sand)
Wandachamp 05-Dec-19 02:00 AM
saying my acc isnt queued
all good shes in
took a couple minutes
Pork 05-Dec-19 02:01 AM
New accounts that are just added to voqueue take 3-5 minutes for mojang to let them authenticate from our servers (since its a new login location), and then its instant login after that
Should be added to faq
Wandachamp 05-Dec-19 02:02 AM
mfw pork knows i just added that acc
Pork 05-Dec-19 02:02 AM
coltsnid 05-Dec-19 06:13 PM
so i just found out something
the bug where it selects the first slot when you rejoin is actually just visual
you still are technically holding the same block
i was holding my sword in my first slot but placing blocks
iZac 05-Dec-19 06:14 PM
ye
to the server you're still in the different slot
so when your client says "i am right clicking", since the server thinks you're holding a block it places it

Pork 07-Dec-19 03:51 PM

Welcome to Discord's home for real-time and historical data on system performance.

Pork 07-Dec-19 03:52 PM

coltsnid 11-Dec-19 01:07 AM
ohh okay
i thought accounts were static on servers
okay nice at least its not some new bug
Pork 11-Dec-19 01:07 AM
Nope, this helps us make sure we get less rate limits from mojang
If an ip gets temp banned from an account i just switch a slave server
coltsnid 11-Dec-19 01:08 AM
that's nice, no risk of triggering some thing where you switch IPs too much?
Pork 11-Dec-19 01:08 AM
It might at some point but we only have 4 now and the chance of getting the same couple servers in a row is high
Once we get more slave servers i might restrict it to a couple per account
coltsnid 11-Dec-19 01:09 AM
good idea

Pork 11-Dec-19 01:09 AM
Huh
coltsnid 11-Dec-19 01:10 AM

Pork 11-Dec-19 01:10 AM

coltsnid 11-Dec-19 01:10 AM

Pork 14-Dec-19 02:20 AM
that is a bug and i think i know what caused it, your jumped so suddenly it missed the alarm and respawned before autodisconnect detected it, i think i can fix it. whats your min health?
Pork 14-Dec-19 03:12 AM
Ok i think i can fix it, but i still can't fix you getting hit for more damage than your current health getting you killed before voqueue can disconnect you, so if you for example have 5 hp and your auto disconnect min is 3 if you get hit for 5 you'll die anyways, so in that case should i still disconnect?
coltsnid 14-Dec-19 03:14 AM
my minimum health was 6
perhaps we should set the default to 10
Pork 14-Dec-19 03:15 AM
Yeah there was actually a bug there, i was checking if autoeat is enabled instead of auto disconnect low hp when enabling hp decrease detection, that stuff ^ is just something that popped into my head
coltsnid 14-Dec-19 03:17 AM

Pork 14-Dec-19 03:19 AM

coltsnid 14-Dec-19 03:23 AM

iZac 14-Dec-19 01:48 PM
voqueue when
Wandachamp 17-Dec-19 12:16 AM

Pork 17-Dec-19 12:17 AM

coltsnid 19-Dec-19 01:42 PM
Pork 19-Dec-19 02:13 PM
fixed that, and the qShare stuff, what should be the correct usage text for qShare now?
coltsnid 19-Dec-19 02:40 PM
wdym
Pork 19-Dec-19 02:40 PM
qHelp
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 19-Dec-19 02:40 PM
List of commands
qHelp - Displays this message qLink - Adds your mc account to VoQueue, run for explanation qDel username - removes your account from voqueue qJoin username - Starts queuing your account qDC username - Stops queuing your account qSee [username] - Checks your account's queue/in-game status (leaving username empty will list all your linked accounts) qSettings username - change account specific settings (AutoEat, AutoDisconnect, etc) qCopySettings username username - copy account settings from first account to the other qRequeue username - requeues your account (equivalent of /queue main) qShareList accountUsername - shows a list of minecraft accounts that have access to your voqueue account qShare username sharedUsername - gives voqueue account access to another minecraft account qUnShare username sharedUsername - removes voqueue account access from another minecraft account qInfo - Displays 2b2t's queue status qExecHelp - list of executive only commands
Pork 19-Dec-19 02:40 PM
what should this say
coltsnid 19-Dec-19 02:41 PM
qShare [VoQueue Account] [Shared Account] (edited)
VoQueue (Alpha) BOT 19-Dec-19 02:41 PM
Error
You dont have an account by that name!
Pork 19-Dec-19 02:41 PM
with the brackets?
coltsnid 19-Dec-19 02:42 PM
i don't know any other way to designate that they are separate variables
Pork 19-Dec-19 02:42 PM
kk, i will have to update all other commands too then
coltsnid 19-Dec-19 02:42 PM
we only use the brackets on that one other command
people aren't going to intuitively know that means its optional
Pork 19-Dec-19 02:43 PM
its obvious to programmers i guess
ill just add [] to all of them (edited)
it will look prettier too
coltsnid 19-Dec-19 02:44 PM
okay that sounds good
also yeah i had no idea that was a thing with the brackets
Pork 19-Dec-19 02:44 PM
its usually <> for required and [] for optional
coltsnid 19-Dec-19 02:45 PM

Pork 19-Dec-19 02:45 PM

i can add an explanation for that at the footer of the help embed too

coltsnid 19-Dec-19 05:12 PM
something just changed
i thought maybe an item i was holding was glitched out

those didn't seem to work
so i binded rootNET's Hotbar Swap to a key and pressed it a few times
and now its fixed
Pork 19-Dec-19 05:13 PM
that just makes it more confusing zoz
ok so i checked the logs
and it looks like the inventory resync keeps failing for some reason:
Connected to master VoQueue server! New User joined! username: boga01 Stopping AntiAFK! Finished backlogging user: boga01 Inventory resync failed! Inventory resync failed! Inventory resync failed! Pork 19-Dec-19 05:17 PM
uh
what
that shouldnt be possible
the only part of voqueue that knows who the shared account is is VoQueue master
and the skin packets come from 2b2t
coltsnid 19-Dec-19 05:21 PM

coltsnid 19-Dec-19 05:34 PM

coltsnid 25-Dec-19 03:51 AM

Pork 25-Dec-19 04:26 AM
@coltsnid yep, like izac said, restarts/mass disconnects/whatever can cause the player to jump ahead and theres nothing i can do about it, thankfully the antiafk should keep it online anyways, about the qSee update delay, everytime an account gets kicked it has a delay of 50 seconds before it joins back in (because 2b2t doesnt allow you to reconnect too quickly) and during those 50 seconds its both offline and has a slave server, which is why you cant qjoin it again and it shows up as offline in qsee, ill check right now about vortexcoalition. (edited)
coltsnid 25-Dec-19 04:27 AM
ahh okay i got it

Pork 27-Dec-19 11:45 AM

looks like during a restart

Pork 30-Dec-19 11:49 AM

Pork 30-Dec-19 11:52 AM
it will prevent the loop completely
coltsnid 30-Dec-19 11:52 AM

Pork 30-Dec-19 11:53 AM

Pork 02-Jan-20 03:25 AM
Just realised the antiafk uses an interval instead of a self calling timeout, which means the antiafk delay doesn't get updated until you get kicked (this is a todo for myself when i get home)
coltsnid 02-Jan-20 09:03 AM
this is wrong
Pork 02-Jan-20 09:07 AM
oh
i know what the problem is
since all i have is an hour
i assume all hours are at the same day
and since 03:05 was long ago, it thought it was just late and started queueing
(your 03:05 is the next day)

coltsnid 02-Jan-20 10:51 AM

Frogamander 03-Jan-20 02:47 AM

coltsnid 03-Jan-20 03:03 AM
yeah if at all possible we need commands to work in vochat
or not send the message if they try to send a command, and have qDM
cause since ingame DMs go to your DMs, a qDM command makes sense

Frogamander 03-Jan-20 03:05 AM
if worst comes to worst make it whenever a message starts with / it doesn't send
Pork 03-Jan-20 03:07 AM
Ill do that i guess
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 03:09 AM
if the message starts with / in #vochat send a DM VoChat does not support commands. Use qDM or qIgnore on <@!629961811747143690> instead.
that's voqueue
Frogamander 03-Jan-20 03:10 AM
yup that sounds good
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 03:10 AM
and also don't send the message to 2b2t chat ofc
Frogamander 03-Jan-20 03:13 AM
yeah lol
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 07:55 AM
no requeue notification
Pork 03-Jan-20 07:57 AM
There's no such thing as a requeue notification
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 01:11 PM
shouldn't it say "WithoutADoubt has automatically started queueing!"?
Pork 03-Jan-20 01:13 PM
i think we discussed this once already, theres requeueing after getting kicked, and theres the AutoQueuer which queues you based on settings under AutoQueue in qSettings, the first one is for all accounts and is just for the usual getting kicked from 2b for afk etc, AutoQueuer is for stuff like slave servers going down (so it needs to reallocate your account to a different server), mojang api problems causing connection problems (in which case you gotta stop queueing for a while and autoqueuer starts it back again later if set to always), and timed queueing
AutoQueuer has notifications
the automatic requeue in the slave servers does not
i can add notifs for that if youd like
https://discordapp.com/channels/466714928443817994/466714928867311629/658698690134933547
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 01:19 PM
hmm, i feel like if someone gets a kick notification they may think their account is safe and logged off when its actually requeueing
so yeah we should probably have a notification for that
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 02:50 PM
two different kick messages
Pork 03-Jan-20 02:56 PM
fixed, will show up in next restart sweep (edited)
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 02:59 PM
nice
coltsnid 03-Jan-20 03:29 PM
can't go back during an input
Pork 03-Jan-20 03:30 PM
Oh that's not a thing
I can implement that if you'd like
Add it to the existing settings overhaul card
I think we can just have a perpetual one zoz, we had 3 cards for it so far
Salamander 03-Jan-20 08:03 PM

your off hand shows up on the right side of the screen and your primary is on the left
iZac 03-Jan-20 09:10 PM

Pork 05-Jan-20 11:31 AM

iZac 05-Jan-20 11:33 AM
don't think it's a bug. the actual players online may be 4, but the thing tracking queue size hasn't updated to see that everyone has been kicked
so when you do totalPlayers - queuePlayers = ingamePlayers queuePlayers is an old value
hence 4 - 285 = -281
Pork 05-Jan-20 11:39 AM
We'll when total players is 4 i think it's safe to assume the server is down anyways

Pork 06-Jan-20 12:41 AM
"bug in node-minecraft-protocol", that's a packet parser/serializer zoz, it doesn't care about what packet its handling
So it couldn't be a cause of such a bug
KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 12:42 AM
Lol my bad i just remember seeing something when looking at docs
Makes sense though lmao i’m an idiot
Pork 06-Jan-20 12:43 AM
Pretty sure what you remember is being unable to ride mobs via 2b2w
No idea how they fucked it up that badly but it works fine in voqueue
KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 12:43 AM
Fuck your right lmao
Pork 06-Jan-20 12:44 AM
Do test pigs/etc again
If it happens again there might actually be a bug
KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 12:45 AM
I’ll hop on just a sec
Pork 06-Jan-20 12:45 AM
altough do note pig riding and horse/donkey/mule/llama riding use 2 different types of packets
KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 12:46 AM
Oh really? Because of the carrot thing?
Pork 06-Jan-20 12:46 AM
Nah the carrot thing is client side
Im just pretty sure with pigs you just send normal movement packets just on a pig
KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 12:46 AM
Also when you log in you whisper yourself some long string
Pork 06-Jan-20 12:46 AM
And with horses to send riding movement packets
You dont need to worry about that
KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 12:47 AM

Pork 06-Jan-20 12:47 AM

KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 12:47 AM

Deepfield 06-Jan-20 05:19 PM

KerchooKult 06-Jan-20 05:19 PM
so you aren't kicked for spamming

Pork 07-Jan-20 12:01 AM

coltsnid 07-Jan-20 03:34 PM
yooo wtf?
My account died despite having all of the AutoDisconnect features on
I think the Minimum health default needs to be raised to 10
Also we need a way to overwrite these settings when we change them, because the majority of people will still have 6 as their default
Pork 07-Jan-20 03:49 PM
If the health jumps from above 6 to 0, by for example falling, there's nothing i can do
I can raise it to 10 but that seems a bit high
We can't have a way to overwrite settings, because you have no idea if someone has a 6 because they want a 6 or because its the default
coltsnid 07-Jan-20 03:58 PM
well clearly 6 isn't high enough since my account just died in an afk area
10 is half hearts
if an account gets to half hearts i don't think it needs to stay in game
6 hearts can clearly be taken at once, so that's definitely too low (i assume a creeper or something got me)?
if this happened to a paid user i imagine they would be very upset, since the account had all of the AutoDC features on
Deepfield 07-Jan-20 05:12 PM

Deepfield 08-Jan-20 12:21 AM

Pork 08-Jan-20 12:28 AM

Deepfield 08-Jan-20 12:32 AM

coltsnid 08-Jan-20 12:32 AM
report everything
repetitive reports mean there is probably a significant issue (edited)

Deepfield 08-Jan-20 12:34 AM
Yeah I'm thinking it's getting stuck in like water or something g
coltsnid 08-Jan-20 12:36 AM
one of the major features we will be prioritizing next (after stabilizing current ones), is edge detection for the AFK walk, meaning it can walk around spawn without getting kicked. Also an automatic /kill setting if its stuck at spawn with nothing in its inventory (edited)

doesn't look like a rootnet thing, could it be getting caused by something packet related?
Pork 12-Jan-20 10:23 AM

iZac 12-Jan-20 10:23 AM
whilst connected to a voqueue account that was in queue
Pork 12-Jan-20 10:24 AM
It's important if the error happened in the first couple seconds of connecting to voqueue or after being connected for a while
iZac 12-Jan-20 10:25 AM
no errors while in the voqueue hub, errors whilst connected to the account in queue, no errors once the account got onto 2b
i can send you the log file?
Pork 12-Jan-20 10:26 AM
Sure
Hmm
So the errors are happening while in direct packets mode (as in backlogging is finished and packets are passed directly™️(there's still some editing) from 2b to client)
So that means its either a sharing system problem, a client problem or a 2b problem
Looks to be a sharing system problem. Will push a possible fix once i get back home. Sharing system is master so we will be able to test it instantly

Pork 12-Jan-20 11:43 AM

Han75 12-Jan-20 11:44 AM

Han75 12-Jan-20 11:44 AM

Pork 12-Jan-20 11:44 AM

Han75 12-Jan-20 11:45 AM

Pork 12-Jan-20 11:45 AM
It just uses a moving average of the queueing ratio
Han75 12-Jan-20 11:46 AM
I thought it was your position*some value = estimated wait
Pork 12-Jan-20 11:46 AM
Yes

Pork 19-Jan-20 02:23 AM

msg += " " + getRandomInt(1 - Math.pow(10, Math.min(105 - msg.length, 8)), Math.pow(10, Math.min(105 - msg.length, 9)) - 1);

when youre kicked from queue it doesnt

Pork 19-Jan-20 11:46 PM
like you see in your screenshot
your queue accounts got kicked first
how would i to know that in the future your other accounts will be kicked too
coltsnid 19-Jan-20 11:51 PM
what i mean is when our system detects a restart (an in-game account gets a restart kick and/or all accounts get kicked), it sends the kick notifications like it normally would, but then sends another one that says "2b2t is restarting! All of your accounts will automatically requeued."
Pork 19-Jan-20 11:51 PM
oh
sure
coltsnid 19-Jan-20 11:51 PM

Pork 19-Jan-20 11:51 PM

yes

i just don't want people seeing their accounts kicked from queue and tagging us about voqueue when 2b is restarting

iZac 27-Jan-20 11:28 AM
Here is a list of blocks with non-standard heights, from tallest to shortest: Fence, Cobblestone Wall: 1 1/2 (also thinner) Soul Sand, Chest, Brewing Stand (stand part): 7/8 End Portal Frame (without Eye of Ender): 13/16 Enchantment Table, Cocoa Bean (plant), Head (on wall): 3/4 Bed: 9/16 Slab, Head (on ground), bottom part of stair: 1/2 Cake: 7/16 Daylight Sensor, Flower Pot: 3/8 Inside of cauldron: 5/16 Brewing Stand (base), Redstone Repeater, Trapdoor: 1/8 Snow: 1/8 per layer after the first (0 for one layer, 7/8 for eight) Lily Pad: 1/64
from july 2013
there's also end rods
flower pots

iZac 07-Feb-20 10:11 PM

coltsnid 07-Feb-20 10:14 PM
well my notifications have been spammed with that for the last 12 hours
so there needs to be some implementation to stop that from happening

Pork 08-Feb-20 03:24 AM
i cant tell from that notification but it looks like it tries auto queueing again instantly, if it does, thats a bug and let me know, if not its reconnecting every 6 minutes after an account error like that
i can do the gradual timeout increase we talked about
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:52 AM
i barely caught it before it was kicked, but my account got stuck on a fence and was kicked/lagged out https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/440045707618025472/675685356590596096/GMRFCKoycN.gif (edited)
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:54 AM
not new
iZac 08-Feb-20 07:54 AM
ye that's known
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:54 AM
izac and me talked about it a couple days ago
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:54 AM
okay good, i really didn't wanna keep tacking on bugs haha
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:55 AM
first one is timed autoqueue
second one is always autoqueue
last one is one of the many slave requeues (edited)
@coltsnid ^
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:57 AM
great charts, i think i get it a bit more now
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:57 AM
the reason we cant just make it one big autoqueue, is master has no knowledge of stuff like hp, players around, etc
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:58 AM
so the slave queue is for server restarts?
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:58 AM
and the slave cant reconnect an account if it itself crashed
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 07:58 AM
oh hp?
Pork 08-Feb-20 07:58 AM
server restarts is a weird one
if its a short server restart
the slave queue will handle it
if its long, the slave wont try connecting 15 times in a row to the same account, to prevent mojang errors
and will let master handle it
but anything in autodisconnect, or just normal 2b2t kicks
is handled by slave queue
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 08:00 AM
that reminds me, i still don't get why we have to reauth the accounts every single time we requeue? like if i log into my minecraft client i can queue multiple times unless i log in somewhere else or wait a really long time
Pork 08-Feb-20 08:00 AM
we dont
we reauth only on AutoQueue (not slave queue) or the person logged into the account himself
(since that invalidates our token)
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 08:00 AM
why does autoqueue invalidate it?
Pork 08-Feb-20 08:00 AM
it doesnt
it just moves to a different slave server (edited)
with a different ip
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 08:01 AM
ohh i wonder if that's what's causing the lockout issues
Pork 08-Feb-20 08:01 AM
im implementing the incremental thing we talked about right now
coltsnid 08-Feb-20 08:01 AM
okay hopefully that helps
it might be bouncing around so many ips that's causing it too though (edited)
Deepfield 08-Feb-20 08:31 PM
Mojang is super finicky with sessions I noticed

coltsnid 13-Feb-20 05:35 AM

the reason no accounts leave the cave is because they don't jump/run around enough
iZac 13-Feb-20 06:05 AM
no they do, it's just a lot more likely for them to go down into the cave than get out of it because their movement is random
it's a lot easier to walk down into a hole than to have the chance of looking in the right direction, walking, and jumping at the same time
coltsnid 13-Feb-20 06:08 AM
i know, i'm just saying they would be more likely to walk out if they tried to jump while walking/sprinting a bit more

Pork 23-Feb-20 12:20 AM

coltsnid 23-Feb-20 12:20 AM
so it does only happen when there are 0 players?
Pork 23-Feb-20 12:21 AM

coltsnid 23-Feb-20 12:21 AM
oh like several people getting kicked at once
Pork 23-Feb-20 12:21 AM

Desyncs can happen

i think we need to stop relying on 2b2t's info and start recording it ourselves
Pork 23-Feb-20 12:22 AM

ah, nvm then
Pork 23-Feb-20 12:22 AM
Yes
coltsnid 23-Feb-20 12:22 AM
oh
it still won't help when no accounts are online
Pork 23-Feb-20 12:22 AM

coltsnid 23-Feb-20 12:25 AM
